title: Strolid Master Demo Deck: One Conversation Engine for Sales + Service
summary: This document presents Strolid's AI-powered conversation engine designed for sales and service in automotive dealerships, aiming to solve fragmented customer conversations and inconsistent follow-up. It details Strolid's platform, people, and process approach to improve lead conversion, customer engagement, and operational visibility.
text:
One Conversation Engine for Sales + Service
People + Process + Platform (powered by AI)
Sales BDC • Service BDC • Strolid GPT • Search • Signals • AI Agents

The dealership reality
Leads don’t fail. Follow-up fails.
• Customers reach out across call, text, email, and chat —
conversations get fragmented.
• Inconsistent response and follow-up drives lost 
appointments and lost ROs.
• Incomplete CRM notes make it hard to coach or trust the 
pipeline.
• Leaders lack visibility into why customers didn’t convert —
and what to fix.
Missed calls after hours
Slow internet lead response
No manager-ready TO
No coaching signal
What Strolid is
We deliver outcomes with People + Process + Platform
People
• Trained Sales BDC + Service 
BDC coverage
• Manager-ready TOs and 
follow-up
• Quality assurance and 
coaching support
Process
• Closed-loop selling and 
recovery cadences
• Consistent scripts, 
standards, and escalation 
paths
• Daily activity + weekly 
improvement rhythm
AI- Platform
• Portal scoreboard and 
accountability
• Strolid GPT + Conversation 
Search + Signals
• AI Agents: Service (Sophia) 
+ Sales Revival
• AI- Co-pilot for your 
website- staff and Strolid
Proof of work: activity scoreboard LIVE
Dealers can see coverage and accountability in 30 
seconds.
• Work completed across channels: calls, SMS, email, chats.
• Manager visibility into TOs, appointments, and day -one coverage.
• Built for multi-rooftop ops: filter by store and time window.

Proof of work: Call Note summaries in your CRM LIVE
Dealers can see coverage and accountability in 30 
seconds.
• No more missed notes or guessing what happened
• Total visibility and transparency
• Same conversations you will see in the Strolid Portal
• Saves Strolid agents time with greater accuracy

Strolid GPT: turn conversations into action lists LIVE
Ask a question → get a work list your team can 
execute.
• Example: “List customers who said the vehicle was priced too 
high.”
• Returns contact details + conversation summary + one -click link to 
the thread.
• Built for managers: spot objections, route follow -up, and coach 
consistently.

Strolid GPT: smart segments for follow-up LIVE
One-click segments that map to real dealership 
plays.
• Priced too high, still shopping, payment/credit concerns, shopping 
competitors.
• VIP follow-up and long-term nurture queues.
• Standardizes follow-up across stores and managers.

Dialer workstation: better calls and cleaner handoffs LIVE
Context + scripts + GPT — built into the agent 
workflow.
• One screen for customer , lead source, vehicle interest, priority, and 
notes.
• Manager extensions and TO context are always visible.
• Roadmap: real-time Co-Pilot prompts and live transcription.

Strolid Sales Revival Agent
Revive the leads you already paid for — with instant human handoff.
• Outbound only for customer -initiated inquiries (web lead, call, 
chat, form). 
• Sophia (AI) can call thousands of leads, leave VM and capture 
customer dispositions when we are engaged.
• Handoff to us when your staff stops trying
• If answered: warm transfer to a live agent immediately.
• If not answered: branded voicemail + smart cadence + optional 
SMS/email touches.
• Detects intent (priced too high / still shopping / credit concern) 
and routes a play.
• Logs every attempt + creates a CRM -ready summary and next 
action.
• See 16% engagement, 15% appointments. 1000 
good customer files =160 engagements and 24 more 
appointments 
Example cadence
Day 3 Call + SMS follow-up
Day 4 Call + email touch
Day 5 Call + voicemail drop
Day 7 Call + “still shopping?”
Day 10 Final attempts + long-term nurture
Live
Lead Intelligence Report: KPIs + narrative IN BUILD
Exec-friendly insights: what changed, why it matters, 
what to do next.
• Tracks volume, mix, appointment rate, show rate, and close rate.
• Highlights risk and opportunity (e.g., third -party dependency).
• Turns performance into clear , plain-English narratives for leaders.

Conversation Analytics: benchmark rooftops IN BUILD
Compare stores by what customers actually say — not 
just lead counts.
• Track satisfaction, price concerns, upset customers, and key 
customer segments.
• “Your dealership vs Strolid average” reveals where to coach and 
where to scale.
• Data validation in progress to ensure accuracy prior to release.

Automotive Co-Pilot widget (dealer site) ROADMAP
Website assistant for inventory, payments, trade-ins, and 
appointment capture.
• Designed to reduce friction and capture intent cleanly.
• Currently deprioritized while we ship Sophia (Service) and Sales 
Revival (Outbound).

Strolid Service Agent (Sophia) IN BUILD
Never miss a service opportunity — even after hours.
• 24/7 inbound service coverage (calls first; optional SMS follow -
up).
• Answers common questions: hours, pricing ranges, loaners, 
recalls, availability.
• Captures: customer, vehicle, concern, and preferred appointment 
windows.
• Schedules into your service scheduler or routes to an advisor 
when needed.
• Creates a clean summary + next step for coaching and follow -up.
Inbound service call
Identify customer + vehicle
Collect concern + timing
Schedule or route to advisor
Confirm + summarize + log
What’s live vs what’s next
Transparent roadmap keeps expectations clear and builds trust.
LIVE
• Sales BDC + Service BDC
• Strolid Sales Revival AI Agent
• Portal scoreboard
• Strolid GPT (Q&A, work lists, 
segments)
• Dialer workstation
IN BUILD
• Strolid Service Agent 
(Sophia)
• Lead Intelligence Report
• Conversation Analytics (data 
validation)
ROADMAP
• Dialer Co-Pilot (real-time 
coaching)
• Dealer-site Automotive Co-
Pilot widget
Next step: pick a pilot that proves value fast
Sales
• Response speed + 
appointment lift
• Manager-ready TOs
• Revival on unengaged 
leads
Service
• Missed-call recovery
• Appointment lift
• Sophia coverage and 
consistent intake
Dealer group
• Benchmark rooftops
• Standardize coaching 
plays
• Visibility into customer 
intent trends
Let’s agree on success metrics, launch a pilot, and review results in 30 days.
